programme.desc: Sari's big plans get derailed when Gabe opens a bakery next door to her family's coffee shop. This launches a prank war to end all prank wars, bringing Sari and Gabe together in a story of love, family, community and delicious pastries.

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: While investigating mysterious activities in the world diamond market, 007 (Sean Connery) discovers that his evil nemesis Blofeld (Charles Gray) is stockpiling the gems to use in his deadly laser satellite. With the help of beautiful smuggler Tiffany Case (Jill St. John), Bond sets out to stop the madman -- as the fate of the world hangs in the balance!

programme.title: Longing
programme.desc: Daniel, a wealthy bachelor in his 60s, learns that a former girlfriend gave birth to a child 20 years ago and that his son has just died. Daniel explores his deceased son's life, getting to know him vicariously through those closest to him, and he reevaluates his life choices.

programme.title: Subjects of Desire
programme.desc: Exploring the cultural shift in North American beauty standards toward embracing Black female aesthetics and features while exposing the deliberate and often dangerous portrayals of Black women in the media.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen remembers what it feels like to be a school kid again when she takes up a new form of exercise.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: An initially fun game of golf between Brent, Lacey and Hank quickly turns into a round robin of aggravation.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: The York Memorial team deals with the life changing-surgery of one of their own.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: Filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance.

programme.title: H.appiness
programme.desc: An app designed to bring its users happiness helps a man build the perfect life, which he ends up destroying when he learns the app is faulty.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second; just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: Strong Fathers, Strong Daughters
programme.desc: When a wealthy businessman learns of his daughter's engagement, he struggles to give up control and trust God with her future.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

programme.title: For Your Eyes Only
programme.desc: When a British ship is sunk in foreign waters, the world's superpowers begin a feverish race to find its cargo: a nuclear submarine control system. And 007 (Roger Moore) is thrust into one of his most riveting adventures as he rushes to join the search ... and prevent global devastation!

programme.title: Octopussy
programme.desc: James Bond (Roger Moore) may have met his match in Octopussy (Maud Adams), an entrancing beauty involved in a devastating military plot to destroy détente. From the palaces of India to a speeding circus train in Germany and a mid-air battle on the wing of a high-flying jet, only Agent 007 can stop the nightmarish scheme!

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military,

programme.title: Afraid
programme.desc: Curtis and his family are selected to test a revolutionary new device, a digital assistant called AIA, that takes smart homes to the next level. As AIA begins to learn everyone's behavior and anticipate their needs, it soon makes sure nothing and no one gets in the family's way.

programme.title: The Best You Can
programme.desc: Cynthia Rand is a New York City urologist whose world gets turned upside down when her husband starts to show signs of dementia. Stan Olszewski is an underachieving security guard who drifts through life without much direction. Their worlds soon collide when a chance encounter leads to a growing friendship built on late-night texts, candid confessions and irreverent humor.

programme.title: Border Hunters
programme.desc: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, a fentanyl overdose claims the lives of an American youth and a paramedic, drawing the U.S. ambassador into a desperate mission to dismantle the cartels. When former spy Abraham Woodhill enlists imprisoned ex-operative Jake Byrne, a violent, high-stakes game unfolds across jungles, villages and cartel strongholds.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom moves to Boston to chase her lifelong dream of opening her own business. A chance meeting with charming neurosurgeon Ryle Kincaid soon sparks an intense connection, but as the two fall deeply in love, she begins to see sides of Ryle that remind her of her parents' relationship. When Lily's first love, Atlas Corrigan, suddenly reenters her life, her relationship with Ryle gets upended, l

programme.title: Hot Flash
programme.desc: A TV newscaster tries to keep her cool when one type of flash leads to another.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: In 1943 lyricist Lorenz Hart confronts his shattered self-confidence in a bar as his former collaborator, Richard Rodgers, celebrates the opening night of his groundbreaking hit musical "Oklahoma!".

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Karen and Davis investigate a mysterious crop circle near Dog River; Oscar and Emma repaint their house.
